title: Westco 15mm Brass Flanged Tank Connector - Heavy Duty
features: Heavy duty tank connector: 15mm BSP compression fitting for secure connections through tanks and vessels
Solid brass construction: Durable and corrosion resistant for long-lasting use
Flanged design: Includes backnut and washer for a secure, leak-proof seal
Easy installation: Designed for straightforward fitting with standard plumbing tools
Versatile use: Suitable for water, heating, plumbing, and irrigation systems
description: The 15mm brass flanged tank connector is a durable and reliable fitting designed for creating a watertight connection through tanks, cisterns, and vessels. Made from high-quality solid brass, it ensures corrosion resistance, long service life, and dependable performance. Supplied with a flanged backnut and washer, it provides a secure seal and easy installation, making it ideal for domestic, commercial, and industrial applications. • 15mm BSP (British Standard Pipe) compression connection • Solid brass construction for maximum durability and strength • Corrosion and rust resistant for long-lasting performance • Flanged design with backnut and washer for secure sealing • Provides a leak-proof connection through tanks, cisterns, and vessels • Suitable for water, plumbing, heating, and irrigation systems • Ideal for domestic, commercial, and industrial plumbing use
